zh.Notre-Dame, Calvados, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾特-達
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de DREUX於1144年出生時，她的父親Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux21歲，母親Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine14歲。她和Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.Notre-Dame, Calvados, Normandy, France: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾特-達
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de DREUX于1144年出生时，她的父亲Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux21岁，母亲Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine14岁。她和Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: DREUX
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de DREUX was born in 1144, her father, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, was 21 and her mother, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, was 14. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de DREUX est née en 1144, son père, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, avait 14 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de DREUX 1144 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux 21 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine 14. Sie hatte mit Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de DREUX è nata il nel 1144, sua padre, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, aveva 14 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil.

ja.Notre-Dame, Calvados, Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスノトレ-ダム
ja.of Breteuil, Évreux, Eure, Upper Normand: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Alix de DREUXが1144年に生まれた時，父Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreuxは21歳，母Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braineは14歳であった。彼女はValeran III Seigneur de Breteuilとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de DREUX(이)가 1144년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de DREUX nasceu em 1144, seu pai, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, tinha 14 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de DREUX родилась в 1144 г., её отцу по имени Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, 14. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de DREUX nació en 1144, su papá, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil.
